title: CoordinateBar
body:
### Coordinate-Bar

Shows ***Coordinates*** in the Action-Bar simple as that **:)**

(**also seen** in [MinuteTech's](https://youtube.com/@minutetechmc/videos) videos) (this was not what he used & i am **not** associated with him in any means!)


   ###     Keybind's
- Toggle: *KP_9*
- Colors: *F10*
- Advanced: *Not bound by default*
